title: Oligochaetochilus muticus
taxonomy: Oligochaetochilus muticus is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and consists of a single species, Oligochaetochilus muticus. The plant is often classified as a member of the subfamily Nolinoideae. The classification of Oligochaetochilus muticus is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics. Further research is needed to confirm its exact taxonomic position within the Asparagaceae family.
